name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior

labels: bug

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Select service: (e.g. Media ver10)
2. Load WSDL
3. Select operation: (e.g. GetStreamUri)
4. Enter parameters: ...
5. Click Execute → see error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include any error messages shown in the result panel.

## Environment
- OS: (e.g. Windows 11)
- Camera model: (e.g. Hanwha Vision XNP-6400R)
- Camera firmware: (e.g. 2.24.01)
- ONVIF service: (e.g. Media ver10)
- Running as: [ ] exe  [ ] Python (dev server)

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, paste the JSON result, Request XML, or Response XML from the result panel.
